case_title: MARA KUBRIN VS. AVENUE BODY SHOP, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUBRIN, MARA
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUBRIN, MARA HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON MAR-18-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-18-2008 CONTINUED TO JUN-06-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) AVENUE BODY SHOP AND PLAINTIFF TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-16-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AVENUE BODY SHOP, INC., OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-06-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO PLAINTIFF KUBRIN, MARA

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUBRIN, MARA AS TO DEFENDANT AVENUE BODY SHOP, INC. PAULY JR, ARTHUR J INDIVIDUALLY AND AS AGENT IF AVENUE BODY SHOP FLORES, NOE INDIVIDUALLY AND AS AGENT OF AVENUE BODY SHOP DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-18-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-03-2008

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-30-2008 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF MARA KUBRIN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. APPLICANT'S MOTHER APPEARED TO NOTIFY THE COURT THAT APPLICANT IS OUT OF TOWN. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE BASED UPON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT'S MOTHER. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: GISELLE S. CASEY, CSR #8098 (206)
